TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_bubun, title = bubun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/bubun} }

S.FORM: alang bubun ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 191 buwan, 499 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 81% kyan ku 403 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 19% kyan ku 96 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 76%, Setik 1%, Bunun 1%, Amis 2%, Hla'aluwa 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na bubun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na bubun hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na bubun hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na bubun hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na bubun hya' ga Knaziy. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang bubun ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 191 buwan, 499 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 81% kyan ku 403 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 19% kyan ku 96 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 76%, Setik 1%, Bunun 1%, Amis 2%, Hla'aluwa 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na bubun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na bubun hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na bubun hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na bubun hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na bubun hya' ga Knaziy. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βuβun ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, ħlaʔaluwa *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βuβun ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na βuβun ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βuβun ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βuβun ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βuβun ħjaʔ ɣa knazij. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
